description_long: This teapot features a whimsical design inspired by the Spider-Man character, with a bright red upper half adorned with black web patterns and large, stylized white eyes outlined in black. The lower half of the teapot is a solid blue, creating a striking color contrast. The handle is robust and rounded, matching the red of the upper body, while the spout is also red and projects outward in a straight, slightly upward-angled fashion. The lid is domed with a small, rounded knob at the top, fitting snugly into the teapot's opening. The overall form is spherical, giving the object a playful and cartoonish appearance. This teapot would stand out as a decorative or functional item in a modern urban kitchen or themed café.
description: A spherical teapot with a Spider-Man motif, featuring red and blue color blocking, web patterns, and large white eyes. The handle and spout are bold and rounded, with a domed lid on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the teapot's spout centered, with the Spider-Man eyes and web pattern prominently displayed.
description_view_1: Side view revealing both the handle and spout, as well as the full Spider-Man face design and the blue lower half.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the handle, with the web pattern and eyes partially visible, and the spout receding from view.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle and spout, with the Spider-Man face and blue base clearly visible.
attribute_spout_orientation: The spout is straight, slightly angled upward, and positioned at the front center of the teapot body.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is a thick, rounded loop attached at the upper and lower sides of the teapot, designed for a comfortable grip.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; domed with a small rounded knob, fitting snugly.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Geometric web pattern with large white eyes on the red upper half, contrasting with the plain blue lower half.
